title: SSA announces return of "no-match" letters
description_html: SSA notifies employers that it intends to resume sending "no-match" letters to employers in 2019. The letters indicate that tax information submitted by an employer does not match the SSA's records. Such letters could potentially suggest that an employee is an undocumented immigrant. [ID #518]
description_text: SSA notifies employers that it intends to resume sending "no-match" letters to employers in 2019. The letters indicate that tax information submitted by an employer does not match the SSA's records. Such letters could potentially suggest that an employee is an undocumented immigrant. [ID #518]
